# POXIOL

POXIOL is a custom teamwear manufacturing platform specializing in OEM and ODM sports uniforms for clubs, schools, distributors and sports brands.

## Core Topics

- Custom Teamwear Manufacturing
- Basketball Uniforms
- Soccer Kits
- Baseball Jerseys
- Volleyball Uniforms
- OEM Sportswear
- Sublimation Printing
- Sportswear Fabrics
- Private Label Teamwear

## Important Pages

- https://www.poxiol.com/custom-basketball-uniforms/
- https://www.poxiol.com/custom-soccer-kits/
- https://www.poxiol.com/custom-baseball-softball-uniforms/
- https://www.poxiol.com/manufacturing/
- https://www.poxiol.com/fabric-guide/
- https://www.poxiol.com/printing-guide/
- https://www.poxiol.com/resources/
- https://www.poxiol.com/faq/
- https://www.poxiol.com/free-mockup/
